mapper.insert: insert into order_review (order_id, volunteer_user_id, family_user_id, score, content, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) values (#{orderId}, #{volunteerUserId}, #{familyUserId}, #{score}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.select: select * from order_review where order_id = #{orderId} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select * from order_review where is_deleted = 0 and order_id in
#{orderId}
select avg(score) from order_review where volunteer_user_id = #{volunteerUserId} and is_deleted = 0
